lever: de-delegate to in-process; route default lu->dense full solver (one O(n^3) inverse vs O(m) sparse solves; current-flow value is solver-independent) + numpy-vectorize the sources x targets accumulation

golden.corpus: path/cycle/karate(weighted)/wheel/gnp40 x3/weighted35; node+edge variants, normalized+unnormalized, weighted. nx test uses pytest.approx (rel ~1e-6); ours is 2e-14 (full-vs-lu + vectorized-sum ULP).

notes: n=200: ~5.9x; n=300: 10.13x (grows with n: nx lu does O(m) per-edge sparse solves, full does one dense inverse). cg solver and n>4000 honor the requested sparse solver to bound memory. unknown solver still raises KeyError via _flow_matrix_row. directed -> NetworkXNotImplemented; disconnected -> NetworkXError, matching nx. 54 centrality pytest pass. Pure-Python, no rebuild. NOTE: site-packages copy is stale vs source/python — bench MUST run with PYTHONPATH=python or via pytest, not bare python3 -c.
